headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: Swear my cat picks the worst moment just to cut me off and risk my life
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.

headlines.h: Weather Alert: A True Gentleman Always Open The Door!
headlines.b: Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-18)
